programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe
programme.desc: Ozzy Osbourne and his wife watch rare and supernatural activity caught on camera.Jack tries to convince his skeptical parents to believe in something that seems out of this world.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe
programme.desc: Ozzy Osbourne and his wife watch rare and supernatural activity caught on camera.Jack tries to convince his skeptical parents to believe in something that seems out of this world.

programme.title: The Osbournes Want to Believe

programme.title: Mountain Life
programme.desc: The creators of the program follow families who want to start a new life in the mountain retreat.They will discover mountainous outdoors, from the forested peaks of the Appalachians to the edges of tropical volcanoes in Hawaii.

programme.title: Mountain Life
programme.desc: The creators of the program follow families who want to start a new life in the mountain retreat.They will discover mountainous outdoors, from the forested peaks of the Appalachians to the edges of tropical volcanoes in Hawaii.

programme.title: How Do Animals Do That?
programme.desc: The animal world is exceptionally fascinating.The program will feature scientific answers to questions about the amazing abilities of some creatures.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern goes on another culinary journey to explore the world's strangest cuisines.Viewers watch as the host discovers and tries rare local dishes.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: It's beautiful here
programme.desc: Dorota Szelągowska will visit unique places in Poland, the existence of which only insiders often know.The host will prove that it is never too late to fulfill your childhood dream and live in a tree house, at least for a while.For those who value greater comfort, he will show luxurious interiors created, among others, by:in an old cotton fabric factory.Viewers will also meet the owners of these charming places, who will tell their stories and reveal how they managed to implement their unique plans and projects.Many of them abandoned life in big cities to be able to do what they love most, i.e. interior design and running unique guesthouses.Dorota Szelągowska will look into every nook and cranny of these original objects, reveal interior design ideas to the viewers and prove that there are many wonderful places in Poland that are truly beautiful. Dorota Szelągowska visits Pabianice.Thanks to many years of revitalization works, the former building of a cotton fabric factory now houses the "Fabryka Wełny" hotel.The presenter will assess the effect of the designers' efforts, who had to combine modern design with elements reflecting the past of this place.At the same time, they could not forget about comfortable conditions for guests.Then Dorota Szelągowska will try the dishes served in the hotel restaurant and talk to the musicians working there.

programme.title: It's beautiful here
programme.desc: Dorota Szelągowska discovers the delightful corners of Poland.It shows places whose existence was previously known only to the initiated.It proves that you don't have to leave the country to reach paradise.

programme.title: It's beautiful here
programme.desc: Dorota Szelągowska discovers the delightful corners of Poland.It shows places whose existence was previously known only to the initiated.It proves that you don't have to leave the country to reach paradise.

programme.title: It's beautiful here
programme.desc: Dorota Szelągowska discovers the delightful corners of Poland.It shows places whose existence was previously known only to the initiated.It proves that you don't have to leave the country to reach paradise.

programme.title: Tiger Shark King
programme.desc: Cameras dive deep into the ocean to show the lives of sharks.The infamous predators have impressive hunting techniques.

programme.title: Marooned with Ed Stafford 2
programme.desc: Former British Army captain and experienced traveler Ed Stafford continues to overcome new challenges.He became known to viewers as a steadfast man who is able to cope with any extreme situation.So far, among others:he underwent a test of survival for 60 days on one of the uninhabited islands of Fiji, where he had no supplies of food, clothing or necessary equipment.Moreover, he walked the trail leading along the Amazon River, which earned him a place in history and the Guinness Book of Records.In the next series of the program "Ed Stafford Beyond Civilization", the traveler once again sets off to the most hostile corners of the world, including the Gobi Desert in Mongolia and the crocodile-infested Guatemalan jungle.

programme.title: Around the world in a camper
programme.desc: The program will show the fate of three teams that set off around the world in campers.The next episodes are a record of their life on the road - they have no plan or any restrictions.

programme.title: Shocking dishes
programme.desc: Jarek Nowak is looking for shocking dishes in Peru.He visits Iquitos - a city located on the Amazon River, to which no land route leads.Looking for extreme taste sensations, he reaches the market.There you can buy products straight from the jungle, such as turtles, crocodiles, fish and worms.Traders also sell magical herbs and unusual potions that can cure various ailments.Later, the host pays a visit to a tribe that eats monkeys, turtles, eggs, intestines with their contents, and spicy Karachama fish soup.

programme.title: The Dead Files
programme.desc: Medium Amy Allan and retired homicide detective Steve DiSchiavi team up to investigate unexplained paranormal phenomena in haunted locations across the United States.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: Martyna Wojciechowska visits Mongolia.There, in the inaccessible mountain areas of Altai, the Kazakh minority lives.They are cut off from their roots, but they maintain traditions from 3,000 years ago.The traveler meets a fourteen-year-old girl with strength and courage greater than many men.Petite, charming Akhbota practices falconry every day after school.It's hard to believe that such a delicate girl can communicate with a predatory bird weighing eight kilograms and whose wingspan reaches up to two meters.Martyna Wojciechowska tells a story about true strength, courage and the bond between man and animal.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: Martyna Wojciechowska is visiting Japan.He decides to meet the doll woman.So she goes to Tokyo, where she meets a man who is in love with Megumi.Practical Japanese people increasingly replace true love in this way.They even marry artificial women.According to estimates, there are as many as twenty thousand men in the Land of the Rising Sun who have such a doll.Their size, weight and appearance reflect humans.The traveler is looking for answers to the questions whether it is possible to fall in love with a doll and whether it is an image of the future.

programme.title: Woman at the end of the world
programme.desc: This time, Martyna Wojciechowska moves not only in space, but also in time.He goes to a place that is only thirty kilometers from Santa Cruz - one of the largest, most populated cities in Bolivia.The traveler visits Mennonites living in harsh and wild rural communities.They consciously reject electricity and modern technology.They devote themselves to religion, farming and animal husbandry.They don't do any sports, they don't have access to TV or phones because all of this is prohibited.Their education ends with basic knowledge of arithmetic and the study of the Bible.Viewers will see how Martyna Wojciechowska finds herself in this extraordinary world.

programme.title: Tiger Shark King
programme.desc: Cameras dive deep into the ocean to show the lives of sharks.The infamous predators have impressive hunting techniques.

programme.title: Marooned with Ed Stafford 2
programme.desc: Former British Army captain and experienced traveler Ed Stafford continues to overcome new challenges.He became known to viewers as a steadfast man who is able to cope with any extreme situation.So far, among others:he underwent a test of survival for 60 days on one of the uninhabited islands of Fiji, where he had no supplies of food, clothing or necessary equipment.Moreover, he walked the trail leading along the Amazon River, which earned him a place in history and the Guinness Book of Records.In the next series of the program "Ed Stafford Beyond Civilization", the traveler once again sets off to the most hostile corners of the world, including the Gobi Desert in Mongolia and the crocodile-infested Guatemalan jungle.

programme.title: Man v Food 2
programme.desc: Adam sets off on a journey across the United States to take part in subsequent rounds of timed eating competitions.Adam will take on Badass Burrito in Las Vegas and a 106-centimetre pizza in San Antonio.

programme.title: Island Life 7
programme.desc: The program presents the stories of people whose desire was to live on an island, in a picturesque area, where the hustle and bustle of the city does not reach. There are those who care about a tropical climate and those who would like to live on islands in the Washington area and have a view of the mountains.Real estate agents will present properties in various price ranges to program participants.From those at an extremely affordable price to the most expensive and luxurious ones.Viewers will find out what the enthusiasts of island life will choose and whether their dreams will finally become a reality.

programme.title: Island Life 7
programme.desc: The program presents the stories of people whose desire was to live on an island, in a picturesque area, where the hustle and bustle of the city does not reach. There are those who care about a tropical climate and those who would like to live on islands in the Washington area and have a view of the mountains.Real estate agents will present properties in various price ranges to program participants.From those at an extremely affordable price to the most expensive and luxurious ones.Viewers will find out what the enthusiasts of island life will choose and whether their dreams will finally become a reality.

programme.title: Taste the world with Pascal
programme.desc: Pascal Brodnicki looks for delicacies from all over the world.It will be possible, among others,to Georgia, Mexico and Madeira.There you will try local delicacies, such as sheep testicles or pancakes with ants.

programme.title: Taste the world with Pascal
programme.desc: Pascal Brodnicki looks for delicacies from all over the world.It will be possible, among others,to Georgia, Mexico and Madeira.There you will try local delicacies, such as sheep testicles or pancakes with ants.

programme.title: Alaska Gold Diggers
programme.desc: Extraordinary encounters with Sarah-Jane and her four daughters who have teamed up to restart two gold mines in Alaska.Cameras closely follow their daily struggles.

programme.title: You Me Malaysia
programme.desc: Famous Malaysians including:actress Diana Danielle, show their beloved country to travelers and bloggers who deal with tourism.

programme.title: Man v Food
programme.desc: Adam Richman travels around the United States to face the greatest culinary challenges.It covers the route from Boston to Seattle.He also goes to any other place where he can overeat.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations

programme.title: Luxury embassies
programme.desc: Holidays in the Maldives mean, above all, the beauty of nature.The ocean delights with the transparency of its azure waters, sandy beaches encourage you to relax on the golden sand, green palm trees enchant with their exotic nature.Traveler Justyna Adamczyk will visit the most exclusive hotels in the world.The price of accommodation in some of them reaches the cost of a mid-range car.Only specialists work in these places;professional designers, cuisine and wine experts.They make sure that guests lack nothing and can fully enjoy their vacation.The host will visit the most luxurious apartments on coral reefs with retractable roofs.He will see a cinema located in the middle of the ocean and a restaurant located six meters below its surface.There is also a wine collection and golf courses watered with desalinated sea water.The expert will also meet the people who designed all these wonders Justyna Adamczyk will go to Tuscany and stay at the Borgo Santo Pietro hotel.It was opened in a 12th-century estate that once served as a resting place for pilgrims heading to the abbey.The host will see the garden and look into the cellar filled with wine - she will try the genre described in the famous "Divine Comedy".Then he will visit the hotel farm, whose vegetables, cheeses and oils are later used in the restaurant and spa area.Finally, Justyna will have a cooking lesson with "Mamma".Together they will prepare traditional pasta.

programme.title: Luxury embassies
programme.desc: Holidays in the Maldives mean, above all, the beauty of nature.The ocean delights with the transparency of its azure waters, sandy beaches encourage you to relax on the golden sand, green palm trees enchant with their exotic nature.Traveler Justyna Adamczyk will visit the most exclusive hotels in the world.The price of accommodation in some of them reaches the cost of a mid-range car.Only specialists work in these places;professional designers, cuisine and wine experts.They make sure that guests lack nothing and can fully enjoy their vacation.The host will visit the most luxurious apartments on coral reefs with retractable roofs.He will see a cinema located in the middle of the ocean and a restaurant located six meters below its surface.There is also a wine collection and golf courses watered with desalinated sea water.The expert will also meet the people who designed all these wonders.
